title: Oracle set to cut thousands of jobs amid rising AI investments and cost pressures
description: Oracle has reportedly begun laying off employees across multiple teams as it ramps up spending on artificial intelligence infrastructure.

title: Oracle stock hops higher after tech titan launches layoffs of thousands
description: Oracle shares hopped higher on Tuesday after word circulated that the tech titan had begun to notify workers their jobs were being eliminated in what's expected to be a surge of layoffs as the artificial intelligence era evolves.
content:

title: AI looming large as Indian startups rack up $10 billion in FY26
description: Artificial intelligence-led startups dominated investor interest, while consumer tech, fintech and healthcare continued to attract venture capital flows during the year. Experts said investments in AI would further accelerate over the next year. Data showed that the first quarter of FY26 saw investments of $2.4 billion across startups, which rose to about $2.6 billion each in the next two quarters.
